hero.passion: <Specializing in crafting modern, responsive and user-friendly Frontends and making safety and scalable Backends. />

about.headline: <About me />
about.text:
My Name is Jonas Stiefer. I'm {{age}} years old and i'm an emerging Web-Full-Stack Developer!
I come from Luxembourg and i'm motivated to take on your challenges.

projects.headline: <My Projects />
projects.joinDesc: Join is a Kanban board in the style of Trello or Jira that I developed independently as a full-stack project. The frontend is built with Vanilla TypeScript and Tailwind, the backend with Django and PostgreSQL. The project is hosted in a Docker container on a Linux server.
projects.sharkieDesc: Sharkie is a 2D browser game developed with Vanilla JavaScript. The player controls a small shark who must defeat enemies within a time limit before the final boss appears.
projects.dabubbleDesc: DABubble is a messenger in the style of Slack or Discord, developed as a group project in Angular with TypeScript and SASS. Real-time communication is powered by Firebase Firestore.
projects.quizlyDesc: Quizly is a quiz app with AI integration. Users can submit a YouTube link whose audio is transcribed with OpenAI Whisper. From the transcription, Google GenAI automatically generates a quiz. The backend was built with Django and Python.
projects.videoflixDesc: Videoflix is a video streaming platform for which I developed the complete backend with Django and PostgreSQL. The application runs containerized with Docker on a Linux server.

contact.headline: <Get in Touch />
contact.togetherText: I am always happy to make new contacts and take on exciting projects. Just send me a message using the form or connect with me on Linkedin or Email.
contact.nameError: Name must be at least 2 characters.
contact.messageError: Message must be at least 10 characters.
